creator: hartzell@alerce.com
text:
Hmmm.  Another data point.

Checked out and built -CURRENT world/kernel, then cd release and `make memstick` (uefi-memstick seems to have gone away between STABLE and CURRENT).

dd'd the image onto a stick, and WOW, it works.

Perhaps I wasn't crazy and there's some cooperation required between the bits in bootx64.efi or ???  There are still things lurking beneath the still surface of the UEFI boot process that I haven't gathered in.

Thanks, as always, for the work!
